title: Phase 3 worker lifecycle round-trip (deterministic smoke)
description: An agent-sim agent subscribes to agent.work.* and agent.lifecycle.* topics, receives a spawn+assign event pair, publishes a work result, and evaluates expected outcomes against Phase 3 protocol events. Suitable for CI-style smoke validation: no LLM, no external services beyond a running event bus.

expected_outcomes.description: agent.lifecycle.spawned event received with worker uid
spawned event payload contains agent uid
